channel.title: Ask The Coach | A1 Physique
channel.description:
Welcome to A1 PHYSIQUE asks the coach, where we rub shoulders with Worcester's favourite endurance coach to extract all the top tips and answer questions that all athletes want to know!
Have a question? Make sure you comment on an episode to get featured in an up-coming episode and receive a shout out.
channel.author: Brad York
channel.itunes:author: Brad York
channel.itunes:summary:
Welcome to A1 PHYSIQUE asks the coach, where we rub shoulders with Worcester's favourite endurance coach to extract all the top tips and answer questions that all athletes want to know!
Have a question? Make sure you comment on an episode to get featured in an up-coming episode and receive a shout out.

item.title: Do You NEED Electrolytes To Run Fast? Pro Coach Answers All | Ask The Coach
item.description:
In episode 34 of Ask The Coach we compare opinions to facts when it comes to hydration. Do you actually need electrolytes to run faster or is there a chance you're overdosing on sodium?!

Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.


Socials:

@A1Physique_

@club_coaction

@askthecoachpodcast
item.dc:creator: Brad York
item.itunes:summary:
In episode 34 of Ask The Coach we compare opinions to facts when it comes to hydration. Do you actually need electrolytes to run faster or is there a chance you're overdosing on sodium?!

item.title: The Rise of Hugo Fry & Runfluencers | Ask The Coach
item.description:
In episode 33 of Ask The Coach we discussed the meteoric social media and running PB rise of Hugo Fry. Boating a 29:37 10km PB and a charismatic charm on social media - what's not to love? We look at his training, world records and compare to other running influencers and their spectacular challenges.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.


Socials:

@A1Physique_

@club_coaction

@askthecoachpodcast

item.title: Ask The Coach - We Interviewed PRO TRIATHLETE Malachi Cashmore | A1 Physique
item.description:
In episode 32 of Ask The Coach we caught up with local Pro Triathlete Malachi Cashmore to learn what makes him so brilliant, how he originally got started in Tri, and some insightful tips of how to fuel and train to prepare for the big races.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.

item.title: Ask The Coach - Are Elite Runners The Next Breed To Dominate Hyrox? Luke Greer | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 31 of Ask The Coach is a scientific breakdown of why it might be elite runners that we see start to break into the Hyrox Elite 15 and dominate. What is it about their training that lends itself to the crossover so well, we saw Luke Greer come straight into the Hyrox Elite race less that 12 months after starting, incredible stuff.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.


Socials:

@A1Physique_

@club_coaction

@askthecoachpodcast

item.title: Ask The Coach - We Answered your Questions At The National Running Show 2026 | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 30 of Ask The Coach is a special edition, we answered your questions LIVE at The National Running Show 2026, and what questions they were! We talk about orthopaedic insoles, suffering to get fast, how to prevent wild toilet breaks and how to break 20 minutes for the 5k! Not an episode you'd want to miss!


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.


Socials:

@A1Physique_

@club_coaction

@askthecoachpodcast

item.description:

item.title: Ask The Coach - Jake Dearden Attempts sub 2:20 at Houston Marathon 2026 | A1 Physique
item.description:
In episode 28 of Ask The Coach we discuss the incredible sub 2:20 marathon attempt at Houston Marathon 2026 from Jake Dearden & all the reaction from a professional coach. How good of an achievement is this relative?

item.title: Ask The Coach - The Worlds Fastest 10K Valencia 2026 With Special Guest James Vaughan | A1 Physique
item.description:
In episode 27 of Ask The Coach we have local Worcester athlete James Vaughan in the studio to help us assess Valencia 10K 2026 including his own personal performance and other career highs. Not forgetting our tradition of a quiz with Coach Dan & James going head-to-head.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.

item.title: Ask The Coach - Is Cross Country The Best Kept Secret In Running? | A1 Physique
item.description:
In episode 26 of Ask The Coach I ask Dan to break down Cross Country for those that have never taken part. We discuss the dangers, thrills and the tea and cake?!

item.title: Ask The Coach - Are Women Better At Sports? Battle of the Sexes Kyrgios vs Sabalenka | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 25 of Ask The Coach tackles the controversial subject of who's better? Men or Women in sports? Kyrgios just defeated Sabalenka 6-3 6-3 in a tennis exhibition match, but does that mean Women can't ever beat men?

Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee

HUGE 20% off.

item.title: Ask The Coach - Meet Dr Sam Impey Hexis App Founder & AI Carb Coding Pioneer | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 24 of Ask The Coach welcomes a very special guest Dr Sam Impey, PhD in Human Nutrition and and passionate chef? We talk through the heritage of Hexis https://www.hexis.live/ , who benefits from such data and why more and more athletes are seeing results from his services.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.

item.title: Ask The Coach - How Did Alex Yee Just Drop a 2:06 Marathon? | A1 Physique

item.title: Ask The Coach - What Caused The Wall Queues At Hyrox London Excel? | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 22 of Ask The Coach talks all things Hyrox London Excel 2025, what went well, was there a rox zone? We also discuss why just being an elite runner, or an Ironman doesn't mean you'll automatically be great at Hyrox.

item.title: Ask The Coach - How Difficult Is Project Se7en Compared To Other Endurance Records? | A1 Physique
item.description:

item.title: Ask The Coach - How Did Aimee Cringle Become A Fitness Powerhouse? | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 20 of Ask The Coach comeswith an extra special Guest, the UK's fittest woman 2024 Aimee Cringle joins us in the studio to talk us through how she become such a force in the fitness world, shares insights into her routine and we get to know her just a little bit better.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' atcheckout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.

item.title: Ask The Coach - Do Drug Tests Actually Work in Sports? | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 19 of Ask The Coach gets controversial when talking drug testing in sports. Does it work? Do people get caught? Are loads getting away with it?

item.title: Ask The Coach - Why Are The Norwegians So Fast?! | A1 Physique
item.description:
Episode 15 of Ask The Coach dives deep into the Norwegian Training Method of running and endurance. Famously the 3 Ingebrigsten brothers have shone a light on just how successful this method can be with Jakob in particular winning gold medals in the middle distance events.

item.description:

item.title: Ask The Coach - Which Athletes Have The Best 'Crossover Potential'? | A1 Physique
item.description:
In Episode 11 of Ask The Coach, I probe Coach Dan on which type of athlete comes with the best set of tools in the toolbox to make a successful crossover into another sport, and why?

You could say I basically ask him, who is the ultimate athlete?

item.description:

item.title: Ask The Coach - The Wearable You Should Trust | A1 Physique
item.description:
In Episode 9 of Ask The Coach, Coach Dan recaps his stunning Iron Man performance at the world championships before we deep dive all of the wearable tech we both use and recommend. We have some quiz style questions which we'd like you to have a go at guessing before Dan makes his final recommendations for which tech to invest in, which data to trust and that coach hack to get the best from your watch.


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.


Please get involved on our socials to ensure the questions you want answers to are included in future episodes and you don't miss out on our competitions.


@A1Physique_

item.title: Ask The Coach - The Best Nutrition Hacks To Maximise Your Potential | A1 Physique
item.description: In Episode 8 of Ask The Coach, we explore the best advice for managing the pillars of your diet when training to become a better athlete. We discuss how to dial in for race day and what to do immediately before your race. Tune in to hear how Coach Dan, who has literally tried everything to educate himself to give you his first hand opinion on what actually works!Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee HUGE 20% off.Please get involved on our socials to ensure the questions you want answers to are included in future episodes and you don't miss out on our competitions.@A1Physique_@club_coaction
item.dc:creator: Brad York

item.title: Ask The Coach - Heart Rate Training & Zone 2 Secrets With PRO Coach | A1 Physique (PART 2)
item.description:
In Episode 7 Part 2 of Ask The Coach, we expose the secrets of Zone 2 & get the inside scoop on how not to obsess over your heart rate, but use it as valuable intel for your own personal development.


Make sure you're following the podcast to ensure you don't miss out on next weeks episode as soon as it's released!


Protein Recovery Coffee discount code 'Ask The Coach' at checkout: https://a1physique.com/products/protein-coffee

HUGE 20% off.

Please get involved on our socials to ensure the questions you want answers to are included in future episodes and you don't miss out on our competitions.

item.title: Ask The Coach - Heart Rate Training & Myth Busting By PRO Coach | A1 Physique (PART 1)
item.description:
In Episode 7 Part 1 of Ask The Coach, we dispel heart rate training myths & get the inside scoop on how to calculate your max heart rate, resting heart rate, discuss heart rate variability and answer some of your viewer submitted questions.


Make sure you're subscribed to the channel to ensure you don't miss out on Part 2 as soon as it's released!Protein Recovery

item.title: Ask The Coach - How To Improve Your 10K Race Time | A1 Physique
item.description:
In this episode we discuss all the best ways to train for a 10K PB and Coach Dan's top tips for race day itself.

We discuss the best shoes, the importance of Vo2 Max, the difference between training for this middle distance race and a 5K and answer all of your viewer submitted questions.


Please get involved on our socials to ensure the questions you want answers to are included next week.


@A1Physique_

@club_coaction

item.description:
This week we tackle the Strava-topping sexy 5K distance with Coach Dan's top tips on how to go and improve your 5K time and impress your Strava mates.


We have user-contributed Q&A once again so please get involved on our socials to ensure the questions you want answers to are included next week.

item.title: Ask The Coach - How To Train for a Marathon | A1 Physique
item.description:
#marathontraining #marathonpreparation #marathonrunning


In Episode 3 of Ask The Coach, we explore all the things you need to do to firstly prepare yourself for your first marathon, structure your training, fuel & top tips for race day.


Watch until the end to see our full viewer Q&A!

Follow us on Instagram to get involved in the upcoming polls.

@club_coaction

item.title: Ask The Coach - Should You Care About Your VO2 Max? | A1 Physique
item.description: In episode 2 of Ask The Coach, we find out just how important Coach Dan thinks VO2 is when coaching athletes, his techniques for improving your VO2 max and a look at some elite athletes and their own performance in this area.Follow us on Instagram to get involved in the upcoming polls.@club_coaction @a1physique_
item.dc:creator: Brad York
item.itunes:summary: In episode 2 of Ask The Coach, we find out just how important Coach Dan thinks VO2 is when coaching athletes, his techniques for improving your VO2 max and a look at some elite athletes and their own performance in this area.Follow us on Instagram to get involved in the upcoming polls.@club_coaction @a1physique_

item.title: Ask The Coach - Questions all runners want to know | A1 PHYSIQUE
item.description: #endurancetraining #athleterecovery #performancecoaching This brand new podcast brings you closer than ever to Worcester's favourite endurance coach, Dan Geisler.We ask the questions all runners want to know, and hear first hand from a professional coach, just what he thinks.Dan has been a professional coach for over 10 years, boasting a PHD among other achievements that you'll learn about in the episode.You can check out his Instagram here: https://www.instagram.com/club_coacti... Check out our Protein Coffee, endorsed by Dan for athlete recovery: https://a1physique.com/Please like, subscribe and comment the questions you'd like me to put to Dan in our very next episode.
item.dc:creator: Brad York
item.itunes:summary: #endurancetraining #athleterecovery #performancecoaching This brand new podcast brings you closer than ever to Worcester's favourite endurance coach, Dan Geisler.We ask the questions all runners want to know, and hear first hand from a professional coach, just what he thinks.Dan has been a professional coach for over 10 years, boasting a PHD among other achievements that you'll learn about in the episode.You can check out his Instagram here: https://www.instagram.com/club_coacti... Check out our Protein Coffee, endorsed by Dan for athlete recovery: https://a1physique.com/Please like, subscribe and comment the questions you'd like me to put to Dan in our very next episode.
